hero.subtitle: A full sales and operations team — built with agents already running in production. Working 24/7, no vacation, no overhead, no sick days.

problem.title: You pay for the click. You only profit when it converts.
problem.body: How much does a lead cost when it cools for 4 hours waiting for a reply? How much is the sale you lose because reception was busy? You burn ad spend while hot leads go to whoever responds faster. The gap between growth and stagnation is response time — and consistency.

solution.subtitle: 14 specialized AI agents ready to run in your business. Sales, qualifying, booking, billing, back-office. All integrated with your WhatsApp and CRM.

team.title2: Hire 1 system — for the price of 1 employee.
team.subtitle: Each agent does the job of a role — together, 24/7, with no payroll, no turnover and no one for you to manage.

roles.name: Sales & Support Rep
roles.role: Replies to every lead in seconds, 24/7. Qualifies, answers (even voice & photo), sells and books on its own. Only hands you the hot ones.

roles.name: Traffic Manager
roles.role: Runs the ads, watches CPL and ROAS, and delivers ready buyers — not a list of tire-kickers.

roles.name: Commercial Management
roles.role: Connects CRM, sheets and payments, moves leads through the funnel and fires remarketing. Zero copy-paste.

roles.name: Financial Assistant
roles.role: Reminds, charges and recovers late payers on its own — politely, without you asking.

roles.name: Analyst
roles.role: Sends the day's report to your WhatsApp and pings you the moment a hot lead arrives.

roles.name: Brilliant Minds
roles.role: A panel of 5 AI experts that debates your move before you risk it — and spies on competitors too.

proof.title: Not a promise. Production infrastructure.
proof.socialClients: ClickParts Brasil · Futuro Solar · Principal Automóveis · Hotel Palace · Casa de Temporada · Casa Reserva Tucano

offer.title: $497/mo
offer.subtitle: The exact cost of one minimum-wage hire with payroll taxes. Instead of 1 person 8h/day, you get 14 specialists 24/7.
notNeededItems: Hire a CTO or technical team
Learn n8n, Python or any tool
offer.includesTitle: What's included (and LIVE in your business):
includes: Training on your content, products and tone of voice
n8n account configured on our infrastructure (no extra cost)

timeline.title: Full implementation in up to 30 days
timeline.step1Body: Infrastructure setup (n8n + Evolution + CRM), channel integration, base import.
timeline.step2Body: Agents trained on your content, products and tone of voice. Internal testing.
timeline.step3Body: Agents live and operating. Daily monitoring for the first 7 days of operation.

items.a: Each implementation takes ~40 real hours from our team (configuration, training, integration). To keep quality on the first batch, we cap at 10. After that, pricing returns to $997/mo for the Growth plan.

items.q: What if I don't have a CRM?
items.a: No problem. We set up a Notion or Airtable as a basic CRM during setup, at no extra cost. When you decide to migrate to HubSpot/Salesforce, we'll integrate.
We have cases in automotive, auto parts, solar, hospitality, real estate, and aesthetics. If your industry isn't on the list yet, you become our first case and get priority treatment.

items.q: How long until I see results?
items.a: Full implementation in up to 30 days (configuration + training + go-live). Agents start running 24/7 from go-live. Lead volume grows as you accelerate paid traffic — and they get smarter with every interaction.

finalCta.subtitle: You're not hiring an agency. You're hiring an AI team for the same cost as one entry-level employee.

items.role: Customer sends a photo of the part — bot identifies and suggests similar items.

items.name: Broadcast & Remarketing
items.role: Re-warms cold base in parallel across multiple numbers, segmented by behavior.

items.name: Smart Hand-off
items.role: Transfers to a human only when needed — discount, negotiation, complaint.

items.name: Autopilot CRM
items.role: Moves the lead between pipeline stages on its own — zero typing.

agents.anchorBody: Hiring one minimum-wage worker — with payroll taxes, benefits and overhead — easily exceeds what most companies budget for an entire AI stack.
agents.anchorFooter: Now imagine 14 specialists, working in parallel, 24/7, for a fraction of that.

pricing.title: Start small. Scale when it pays off.
pricing.subtitle: Each plan combines a one-time setup with a monthly retainer. You only scale once the automation proves its return. Prices in USD — EUR on request.

plans.name: Starter
plans.desc: One AI agent or automation, deployed and running.

plans.name: Growth
plans.desc: A full automation system across your operation.

plans.name: Scale
plans.desc: A tailored AI product or SaaS for your market.

cta.title: Ready to put AI to work?
cta.subtitle: Book a free 30-minute automation audit. We'll show you exactly where AI can save time and generate revenue in your business — no pitch, just a plan.
cta.note: No commitment. Available in English & Portuguese.

items.q: Do you work with international clients?
items.a: Yes. We deliver globally and invoice in USD or EUR. All meetings and documentation are available in English and Portuguese.

items.q: How long does it take to launch?
items.a: A Starter automation typically goes live in 1–2 weeks. Full systems and custom SaaS depend on scope, defined in the blueprint stage.
That's the point. We handle the technology end-to-end. You get a working system and a clear explanation of how it makes you money.

items.q: Do I need to replace my current tools?
items.a: No. We integrate with what you already use — CRM, spreadsheets, WhatsApp, payment tools and more.
